message:
perf: optimize React rendering with useMemo and React.memo

- stats-grid.tsx: Memoize parsed stat values to avoid re-parsing on render
- tldr-tool-grid.tsx: Wrap ToolSearchBar, EmptySearchState, SectionHeader with React.memo
- three-scene.tsx: Use seeded random for deterministic star positions (fixes lint error)

All optimizations are isomorphic - same output, better performance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
